forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Smoke and scattered showers and thunderstorms before midnight, then areas of smoke and isolated showers and thunderstorms between midnight and 3am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 72. South southwest wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 11am and noon, then showers and thunderstorms likely between noon and 5pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny. High near 90, with temperatures falling to around 87 in the afternoon. West wind 8 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

sections.header: Traffic Impact: The intersection will be closed to all through traffic
sections.content: . Please follow the posted detour route during construction.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
